summary: Iteration 35 testing complete: Credit Package Purchase feature fully verified. Backend 14/14 tests passed. Frontend all credit modal UI tests passed.
critical_code_review_comments: CREDIT_PACKAGES constant defined at line 682 in server.py with 4 packages: pack_100, pack_350, pack_700, pack_1300
GET /api/credits/packages returns packages with correct prices and discounted_price field
Free users: has_discount=False, discount_percent=0, discounted_price equals original price
Subscribed users (Plus/Pro/Ultra): has_discount=True, discount_percent=15, 15% off applied
POST /api/credits/buy adds bonus_credits to user, returns credits_added, bonus_credits, price_paid
GET /api/usage includes bonus_credits field, credits_remaining = daily + bonus - used
spend_credits() in server.py (line 839) deducts from bonus when daily exhausted
Frontend Dashboard.js: showCredits modal state at line 81, fetchCreditPackages at line 259
Frontend handleBuyCredits at line 266 calls POST /api/credits/buy with confirmation dialogs
Credit modal shows discount banner '%15 Abone Indirimi Uygulandi!' for paid plans
Strikethrough styling on original prices when discount applies
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 35 tested credit package purchase feature. 4 packages: 100 ($2.99), 350 ($8.99), 700 ($14.99), 1300 ($24.99). Plus/Pro/Ultra get 15% discount. POST /api/credits/buy adds to bonus_credits. Modal accessed via Settings -> Kredi Al button (data-testid=buy-credits-btn). Frontend shows discount banner for paid users, strikethrough on original prices.
